paragraph 34, including the nature of exposures, product classes or portfolio
segments in respect of which such rebuttal may be considered, shall be clearly
documented and approved by the Board or an appropriate Board-approved
committee.
requirements.object: approved by the Board or an appropriate Board-approved committee

requirements.full_sentence: The same shall be applied consistently to similarly placed exposures.
requirements.object: similarly placed exposures

conditions: where the presumption referred to in paragraph 33 has been rebutted
requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall maintain adequate documentation supporting each instance, or class
of instances, where the presumption referred to in paragraph 33 has been rebutted,
including the rationale, supporting evidence, validation and periodic review thereof.
requirements.object: each instance, or class of instances

conditions: Where the basis for such rebuttal is found to be inadequate
requirements.full_sentence:
Where the basis for such rebuttal is found to be inadequate, the bank shall cease
to apply such rebuttal and shall recognise significant increase in credit risk in
accordance with paragraph 33.
requirements.object: rebuttal and shall recognise significant increase in credit risk in accordance with paragraph 33

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may not be required to test the following instruments for SICR:
(1) SLR eligible investments;
requirements.object: the following instruments for SICR: (1) SLR eligible investments

requirements.full_sentence:
For lease receivables and trade receivables, loss allowances shall always be
measured at an amount equal to lifetime ECL irrespective of the stage of the
instrument.
requirements.object: an amount equal to lifetime ECL irrespective of the stage of the instrument

requirements.full_sentence: A bank may use "Simplified Approach" for the same.
requirements.object: the same

requirements.full_sentence:
For calculation of ECL for instruments other than those mentioned in paragraph
41 above, a bank shall use a general approach consisting of three key functions
i.e., Probability of Default (PD), Loss Given Default (LGD) and Exposure at Default
(EAD) conforming to the instructions and principles outlined in these Directions.
requirements.object: consisting of three key functions i

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank's estimate of ECL on loan commitments shall be consistent with its
expectations of drawdowns on that loan commitment, i.e.
requirements.object: expectations of drawdowns on that loan commitment, i

conditions: when estimating 12-month ECL
requirements.timeline:
within 12 months
of the reporting date when estimating 12
requirements.full_sentence:
it shall consider the
expected portion of the loan commitment that will be drawn down within 12 months
of the reporting date when estimating 12-month ECL, and the expected portion of
the loan commitment that will be drawn down over the expected life of the loan
commitment when estimating lifetime ECL.
requirements.object: of the loan commitment that will be drawn down within 12 months of the reporting date when estimating 12-month ECL, and

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall be noted that since ECL considers the amount and timing of payments, a
credit loss arises even if the bank expects to be paid in full but at a later point in
time than the contractual date.
requirements.object: ECL considers the amount and timing of payments, a credit loss arises even if the bank expects to be paid in full but at a later p

requirements.full_sentence:
Under the Expected Credit Loss (ECL) framework using the PD-LGD approach,
banks shall compute Stage 1 ECL using a 12-month Probability of Default (PD)
and Stage 2 ECL using a lifetime PD.
requirements.object: using a 12-month Probability of Default (PD) and Stage 2 ECL using a lifetime PD

requirements.full_sentence:
Upon migration of an exposure from Stage
1 to Stage 2, or otherwise becomes subject to lifetime ECL, the bank shall estimate
and apply a lifetime PD that appropriately reflects the revised credit risk
characteristics of the exposure at the time of such migration.
requirements.object: lifetime PD that appropriately reflects the revised credit risk characteristics of the exposure at the time of such migration

requirements.full_sentence:
The lifetime PD shall
not be derived in a mechanical manner solely from PD parameters calibrated for
Stage 1 exposures without appropriate adjustment for the higher risk profile and
lifetime horizon of the exposure.
requirements.object: mechanical manner solely from PD parameters calibrated for Stage 1 exposures without appropriate adjustment for the higher risk profil

requirements.full_sentence:
The periods which are considered as the lifetime for estimating the ECL may
vary for different types of financial instruments.
requirements.object: of financial instruments

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to maintain consistency
in the definition of lifetime, a bank shall be guided by the following for
assessment of lifetime for different financial instruments:
(1) Financial instruments without undrawn component: The maximum period to
consider when measuring the lifetime ECL is the maximum contractual period
(including extension options) over which the bank is exposed to credit risk and
not a longer period, even if that longer period is consistent with business
practice.
requirements.object: following for assessment of lifetime for different financial instruments: (1) Financial instruments without undrawn component: The ma

requirements.full_sentence:
For such financial instruments
the bank shall measure ECL over the period that the bank is exposed
to credit risk and ECL would not be mitigated by credit risk
management actions, even if that period extends beyond the
maximum contractual period.
requirements.object: period that the bank is exposed to credit risk and ECL would not be mitigated by credit risk management actions, even if that per

conditions:
When determining the period over
which the bank is exposed to credit risk on the financial instrument
requirements.full_sentence:
When determining the period over
which the bank is exposed to credit risk on the financial instrument,
it should consider factors such as relevant historical information and
experience on similar financial instruments.
requirements.object: relevant historical information and experience on similar financial instruments

requirements.full_sentence:
The measurement of
expected credit losses shall take into account credit risk
management actions that are taken once an exposure has increased
in credit risk, such as the reduction or withdrawal of undrawn limits.
requirements.object: risk management actions that are taken once an exposure has increased in credit risk, such as the reduction or withdrawal of

conditions:
when measuring ECL shall ordinarily be the
maximum contractual period
requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Revolving loan commitments without auto renewal (working
capital demand loans, cash credit, overdraft facilities): The maximum
period to consider when measuring ECL shall ordinarily be the
maximum contractual period, including extension options, over
which the bank is exposed to credit risk.
requirements.object: contractual period, including extension options, over which the bank is exposed to credit risk

conditions: when the bank is able to demonstrate
requirements.full_sentence:
However, the renewal
date may be considered as the relevant point for measurement only
when the bank is able to demonstrate, through documented policy
<image>
and observed practice, that the renewal process is substantive in
nature and results in a fresh and effective reassessment of the
borrower's credit risk.
requirements.object: relevant point for measurement only when the bank is able to demonstrate, through documented policy <image> and observed practice

requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, the bank shall evidence that, at the time of such
renewal, there are instances of significant changes to terms and
conditions, including reduction or withdrawal of limits,
enhancement of security, revised pricing, or non-renewal
depending on the changes in financial and other conditions of the
borrower, as applicable.
requirements.object: time of such renewal, there are instances of significant changes to terms and conditions, including reduction or withdrawal of l

conditions: where appropriate
requirements.full_sentence:
This assessment may be undertaken at
individual, or where appropriate, at a portfolio level.
requirements.object: or where appropriate, at a portfolio level

requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) Revolving facilities with auto renewal as per contract (Example:
credit cards): In the case of such facilities, the bank shall determine
the period over which expected credit losses are to be measured
based on the period for which it is exposed to credit risk.
requirements.object: which expected credit losses are to be measured based on the period for which it is exposed to credit risk

requirements.full_sentence:
For this
purpose, the bank shall analyse the historical data, including
default patterns, drawdown behaviour and the effectiveness of
actions such as reduction, suspension or cancellation of limits.
requirements.object: including default patterns, drawdown behaviour and the effectiveness of actions such as reduction, suspension or cancella

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Guarantee: The period over which ECL shall be measured is the maximum
contractual period over which the bank has a present contractual obligation to
pay or perform as per the terms of the contract.
requirements.object: maximum contractual period over which the bank has a present contractual obligation to pay or perform as per the terms of the contr

requirements.full_sentence:
The estimate of ECL shall reflect an unbiased and probability-
weighted amount, determined by evaluating a range of possible outcomes.
requirements.object: probability- weighted amount, determined by evaluating a range of possible outcomes

requirements.full_sentence:
For the above purpose, a bank shall use multiple scenarios with each scenario
representing the relationship between the key components of ECL and the relevant
macroeconomic variables.
requirements.object: each scenario representing the relationship between the key components of ECL and the relevant macroeconomic variables

requirements.full_sentence:
The probability weight assigned to each scenario shall be determined by the bank
inter alia taking into account historical experience and expert judgement, as
appropriate.
requirements.object: bank inter alia taking into account historical experience and expert judgement, as appropriate

requirements.full_sentence:
The above shall be subject to oversight under the bank's approved
governance framework.
requirements.object: under the bank's approved governance framework

requirements.full_sentence:
ECL for a financial instrument originated/invested on or after April 1, 2027 shall be
computed using the EIR determined at initial recognition4.
requirements.object: EIR determined at initial recognition4

requirements.full_sentence:
ECL for a POCI financial
asset originated on or after April 1, 2027 shall be computed using the "Credit-
adjusted effective interest rate".
requirements.object: "Credit- adjusted effective interest rate"

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the opening ECL as on April 1, 2027
(computed based on the balance sheet position as on March 31, 2027) may, at the
discretion of the bank, be calculated using contractual interest rate as the
discounting factor, in the interim.
requirements.object: of the bank, be calculated using contractual interest rate as the discounting factor, in the interim

requirements.full_sentence:
However, ECL computation for all such
outstanding loans shall be fully migrated to EIR regime on or before March 31,
2030.
requirements.object: EIR regime on or before March 31, 2030

requirements.full_sentence:
While calculating the effective interest rate, a bank shall estimate the expected
cash flows by considering all the contractual terms of the financial instrument (for
example, prepayment, extension, call and similar options) but shall not consider
the expected credit losses.
requirements.object: losses

requirements.full_sentence:
However, in those rare cases when it is not possible to
reliably estimate the cash flows or the expected life of a financial instrument (or
group of financial instruments), the bank may use the contractual cash flows over
the full contractual term of the financial instrument (or group of financial
instruments).
requirements.object: flows over the full contractual term of the financial instrument (or group of financial instruments)

requirements.full_sentence: 4 Banks are required to re-estimate EIR for floating-rate instruments whenever there is a change in the benchmark rate.
requirements.object: floating-rate instruments whenever there is a change in the benchmark rate

requirements.full_sentence:
ECL on loan commitments shall be discounted using the effective interest rate, or
an approximation thereof, that will be applied when recognising the financial asset
resulting from such commitment.
requirements.object: effective interest rate, or an approximation thereof, that will be applied when recognising the financial asset resulting from

requirements.full_sentence:
In the case of revolving facilities and guarantee
contracts for which the EIR cannot be determined directly, the bank shall apply a
discount rate that reflects the current market assessment of the time value of money
and the risks that are specific to the cash flows.
requirements.object: that reflects the current market assessment of the time value of money and the risks that are specific to the cash flows

requirements.full_sentence:
For computation of ECL, the estimate of expected cash shortfalls shall reflect the
cash flows expected from collateral and other credit enhancements that are part of
the contractual terms of the financial instrument, to which the bank has a valid
recourse.
requirements.object: expected from collateral and other credit enhancements that are part of the contractual terms of the financial instrument, to w

requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of
Stage 3 financial instruments, for exposures beyond ₹7.5 crore, the collateral
charged in favour of the bank shall be valued at the time of classification and
thereafter, at least once every two years, by the valuers appointed, as per the
bank's internal policy.
requirements.object: time of classification and thereafter, at least once every two years, by the valuers appointed, as per the bank's internal policy

conditions: In case of stock
requirements.full_sentence:
In case of stock, such valuation shall be undertaken at least
annually.
requirements.object: annually

requirements.full_sentence:
Frequency of valuation of other exposures may be determined as per the
internal policy of the bank in this regard.
requirements.object: the internal policy of the bank in this regard

requirements.full_sentence:
The internal policy and governance framework of a bank shall cover all material
aspects of the ECL lifecycle.
requirements.object: of the ECL lifecycle

requirements.full_sentence:
The bank's Board of Directors shall be responsible
for oversight of the implementation and ongoing functioning of the ECL Framework.
requirements.object: of the implementation and ongoing functioning of the ECL Framework

requirements.full_sentence:
A committee of the Board, or a Board-approved committee, including the Chief
Financial Officer (CFO) and Chief Risk officer (CRO), shall oversee robust
implementation of the ECL framework.
requirements.object: the ECL framework

requirements.full_sentence:
The focus area of the subcommittee shall
inter alia include:
(1) reviewing and challenging the ECL implementation strategy adopted by the
management.
requirements.object: reviewing and challenging the ECL implementation strategy adopted by the management

requirements.full_sentence: A bank shall have a sound credit risk assessment and measurement process.
requirements.object: risk assessment and measurement process

requirements.full_sentence:
The
processes, systems, tools and data used for computation of ECL shall, to the extent
relevant, be consistent with and drawn upon those used for credit risk assessment.
requirements.object: relevant, be consistent with and drawn upon those used for credit risk assessment

requirements.full_sentence:
Such common processes, systems, tools and data may include credit risk rating
systems, estimated PDs (subject to appropriate adjustments), past-due status,
loan-to-value ratios, product type, collateral type etc.
requirements.object: systems, estimated PDs (subject to appropriate adjustments), past-due status, loan-to-value ratios, product type, collatera

conditions:
where each "credit
risk grade/range of score" is clearly defined and consistently applied
requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall have an effective credit risk rating/scoring system where each "credit
risk grade/range of score" is clearly defined and consistently applied, and which
accurately grades differing credit risk characteristics, identifies changes in credit
risk on a timely basis, and prompts appropriate action.
requirements.object: risk rating/scoring system where each "credit risk grade/range of score" is clearly defined and consistently applied, and whi

requirements.full_sentence:
An effective "credit risk rating/scoring system" shall comprehensively capture the
varying level, nature and drivers of credit risk that may manifest themselves over
time in a financial instrument, to reasonably ensure that all lending exposures are
properly monitored and that ECL allowances are appropriately measured.
requirements.object: level, nature and drivers of credit risk that may manifest themselves over time in a financial instrument, to reas

requirements.full_sentence:
The credit risk data collected by the bank shall be sufficiently granular to enable
meaningful assessment of the borrowers' credit profile and to ensure that
borrowers with similar risk characteristics are appropriately segmented together.
requirements.object: enable meaningful assessment of the borrowers' credit profile and to ensure that borrowers with similar risk characteristi

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall develop comprehensive processes for the identification, assessment
and management of data quality risks associated with data used as inputs to
models or otherwise used at various stages of ECL computation.
requirements.object: the identification, assessment and management of data quality risks associated with data used as inputs to models

requirements.full_sentence:
Such processes
shall be applicable to both internal and external data.
requirements.object: internal and external data

requirements.full_sentence:
The bank shall also ensure
effective management of historical data.
requirements.object: of historical data

requirements.full_sentence:
During the process of data aggregation, whether internal or external, a bank shall
avoid material inconsistency or selective use of data, as the same may result in
inaccurate or biased ECL outcome.
requirements.object: selective use of data, as the same may result in inaccurate or biased ECL outcome

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may exclude certain information during
data aggregation only where such exclusion does not have a material impact on
the ECL computation.
requirements.object: data aggregation only where such exclusion does not have a material impact on the ECL computation

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall maintain sufficient historical loss data, covering an adequately
representative period, to provide a meaningful basis for analysis of its credit loss
experience for use as a starting point in estimating the level of loss allowances on
an individual or collective basis.
requirements.object: data, covering an adequately representative period, to provide a meaningful basis for analysis of its credit loss

requirements.full_sentence:
In determining the period of such data, the bank
shall take into account the nature of the portfolio, data availability, and the need to
capture variations across business cycles and associated outliers.
requirements.object: nature of the portfolio, data availability, and the need to capture variations across business cycles and associated outliers

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall group exposures into segments with shared credit risk characteristics
so that the bank can reasonably assess changes in credit risk and thus the impact
on the estimate of ECL.
requirements.object: with shared credit risk characteristics so that the bank can reasonably assess changes in credit risk and thus the impac

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank's methodology for segmenting exposures to assess
credit risk shall be documented and subject to appropriate review and internal
approval.
requirements.object: to appropriate review and internal approval

requirements.full_sentence:
The basis of grouping into a segment shall be reviewed periodically, to ensure that
exposures within the group remain homogeneous in terms of their response to
credit risk drivers.
requirements.object: ensure that exposures within the group remain homogeneous in terms of their response to credit risk drivers

requirements.full_sentence:
Segments identified at initial recognition based on similar credit risk characteristics
may not necessarily remain appropriate subsequently, given that the relevant
characteristics and their impact on the level of credit risk for the group may change
over time.
requirements.object: given that the relevant characteristics and their impact on the level of credit risk for the group may ch

conditions:
where relevant new
information is received
requirements.full_sentence:
In such cases, the grouping of exposures into various segments shall
be re-evaluated and exposures shall be re-segmented where relevant new
information is received, or where changes in the bank's expectations of credit risk
so warrant.
requirements.object: shall be re-segmented where relevant new information is received, or where changes in the bank's expectations of credit

requirements.full_sentence:
Exposures shall not be grouped in such a way that an increase in the credit risk of
a particular exposure is masked by the performance of the group as a whole.
requirements.object: a way that an increase in the credit risk of a particular exposure is masked by the performance of the group as a whole

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall, at each reporting date, include borrower-specific factors, general
economic conditions and an assessment of both the current as well as the
forecasted macroeconomic variables in the assessment of ECL.
requirements.object: date, include borrower-specific factors, general economic conditions and an assessment of both the current as well as the forecast

requirements.full_sentence:
While estimating
ECL over longer time horizons, which may involve greater estimation uncertainty
and judgment, a bank may rely on internal projections based on available and
reasonable information.
requirements.object: and judgment, a bank may rely on internal projections based on available and reasonable information

requirements.full_sentence: Historical information shall serve as an important anchor for measurement of ECL.
requirements.object: anchor for measurement of ECL

requirements.full_sentence:
However, a bank shall adjust the risk parameters derived from historical data, such
as Observed Default Rate (ODR), on the basis of current observable data so as to
reflect the effects of current economic conditions and forecasts of future conditions
that did not affect the period on which the historical data is based.
requirements.object: derived from historical data, such as Observed Default Rate (ODR), on the basis of current observable data so as to reflect

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall
regularly review the methodology and assumptions used for estimating ECL so as
to reduce any differences between estimates and actual credit loss experience.
requirements.object: and assumptions used for estimating ECL so as to reduce any differences between estimates and actual credit loss expe

conditions: where historical data on ODR or LGD is unavailable
requirements.full_sentence:
In cases where historical data on ODR or LGD is unavailable, a bank may use
suitable benchmarks, which shall be periodically validated.

The links between macroeconomic variables and credit risk drivers shall be clearly
established.

conditions: Where statistical linkages are weak
requirements.full_sentence:
Where statistical linkages are weak, expert credit judgment may be
used to guide ECL estimates, provided that the rationale is thoroughly documented
and rigorously reviewed at appropriate governance levels.
requirements.object: documented and rigorously reviewed at appropriate governance levels

requirements.full_sentence:
Such judgment shall
also take into account the bank's position in the credit cycle so as to ensure
context-specific estimates.
requirements.object: the bank's position in the credit cycle so as to ensure context-specific estimates

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall develop a disciplined and robust approach to the assessment and
measurement of ECL and shall have in place adequate processes, systems and
controls to ensure that ECL estimates are unbiased and subject to appropriate
governance.
requirements.object: robust approach to the assessment and measurement of ECL and shall have in place adequate processes, systems and controls to

requirements.full_sentence:
ECL assessment and measurement may involve a number of models, with some
models providing input to the next model during the ECL computation lifecycle.
requirements.object: models, with some models providing input to the next model during the ECL computation lifecycle

requirements.full_sentence:
A
<image>
bank shall implement a three-tier model risk management framework as part of
internal control framework so as to ensure clear accountability:
(1) Front-Line Operations: Model owners shall be responsible for the
development, implementation, and use of models, and for ensuring that such
models are subject to appropriate approval, independent validation, promptly
addressing changes and maintaining accountability for performance within the
bank's policies.
requirements.object: risk management framework as part of internal control framework so as to ensure clear accountability: (1) Front-Line Oper

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Risk Management and Compliance: The risk management function shall
identify and monitor risks arising from ECL model ecosystem, oversee
independent validation, enforce model risk limits, and ensure appropriate
remedial actions wherever required.
requirements.object: arising from ECL model ecosystem, oversee independent validation, enforce model risk limits, and ensure appropriate remedia

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Internal Audit: Internal audit shall provide objective assurance on the
effectiveness of the above two layers, and shall report to the Board or the Audit
Committee on ECL and model risk management.
requirements.object: the effectiveness of the above two layers, and shall report to the Board or the Audit Committee on ECL and model risk m

requirements.full_sentence:
ECL allowances in respect of Stage 3 financial instruments shall be treated as
specific provisions.
requirements.object: provisions

requirements.full_sentence:
ECL allowances in respect of Stage 1 and Stage 2 financial
instruments shall be eligible to be treated as general provisions for inclusion in Tier
2 capital, subject to the extant prescribed limits.
requirements.object: treated as general provisions for inclusion in Tier 2 capital

requirements.full_sentence:
Any management overlay shall
also be treated as general provision for this purpose.
requirements.object: general provision for this purpose

conditions: Where a bank has more than one exposure to a borrower
requirements.full_sentence:
Where a bank has more than one exposure to a borrower, and any one of such
exposures is classified as Stage 3, all exposures to that borrower including non-
funded exposures shall also be classified as Stage 3.
requirements.object: Stage 3

requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, Stage 3
classification shall be applied at the borrower-level and Stage 2 classification shall
be applied at the facility level.
requirements.object: borrower-level and Stage 2 classification shall be applied at the facility level

requirements.full_sentence:
A financial instrument, other than a restructured financial instrument, classified as
Stage 3, may be straightaway upgraded to Stage 1, after all the irregularities which
<image>
lead to Stage 3 classification cease to exist, including absence of any evidence
indicating SICR.

requirements.full_sentence:
If there is evidence of SICR, the financial instrument may be
moved to Stage 2.

A financial instrument (other than that of an MSME to whom the aggregate
exposure of commercial banks5 is less than Rs.25 crore) restructured in terms of

be classified as Stage 1, upon achievement of satisfactory performance during the
specified period, provided there is no SICR.

A financial instrument (of an MSME to whom the aggregate exposure of
commercial banks5 is less than Rs.25 crore) restructured in terms of Reserve Bank

amended from time to time, and classified as Stage 3, shall be classified as Stage
1 upon fulfilling the conditions prescribed at paragraph 59 of aforesaid Directions,
